reasoning: The outcome of this market is firmly 'NO'. As of the knowledge cutoff in March 2026, the US GDP growth numbers up to Q4 2025 are already published. Q1 2025 registered at -0.5%, but crucially, Q2 2025 rebounded strongly to +3.8%, Q3 2025 saw +4.4% growth, and Q4 2025 was positive at +1.4%. Because none of the 2025 or late 2024 periods experienced two consecutive negative quarters of GDP growth, the resolution criteria have not been met. This aligns precisely with the market's 1% probability estimate on March 6, 2026. Data confirms it is impossible for the market to resolve YES.
